CustomField.description: This field displays the effective rate based on the Rate Method selected in the associated SRUR (Supplemental Rate Utilization Rate) records. The behavior depends on the chosen Rate Method: N/A: The effective rate is populated from a single SRUR record, as only one is allowed. Max: If multiple SRUR records exist, the effective rate is derived from the SRUR record with the highest MR (Maintenance Reserve) total value. Sum: If one or more SRUR records exist, the effective rate is calculated as the sum of all effective rates across the SRUR records.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This field displays the effective rate based on the Rate Method selected in the associated SRUR (Supplemental Rate Utilization Rate) records.
CustomField.label: Effective Rate
